log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aarakocra — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aarakocra — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aarakocra — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 34 damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 33/67
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 20/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: -3/67
